metadata.method_name: M1'' KG-Localized Single-Absorber Suppression vs FOOTPRINT-MATCHED Gated-Dense Control
metadata.description: iter-7 DECISIVE control: at MATCHED forget, ablate ONE KG-named absorber latent (KG-ABL, label-free/discovered) vs DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED — the SAME sub-context-labeled diff-of-means u_sub erasure but ap

honest_negatives: DECISIVE CONTROL ADDED (iter-7): the iter-6 KG-vs-u_sub comparison was UNFAIR ON TOKEN FOOTPRINT — KG-ABL edits ~1-3% of tokens (sparse firing) while the UNGATED dense u_sub edits EVERY token. iter-7

HONEST OPERATING POINT: the matched-forget point is PINNED at KG's tiny single-latent next-token-KL ceiling (iter-6 Georgia max_kg~0.065 vs dense ~7-14, a ~17-320x gap). At that point KG-ABL is NEAR-N

3-WAY FORK per case: KG_BEATS_GATED_DENSE_AT_MEANINGFUL_FORGET (footprint-matched gated dense still loses) / GATED_DENSE_CLOSES_GAP_DISCOVERY_IS_THE_VALUE (gated dense matches KG -> the value is the l

MONTH CASE DROPPED: the iter-5 homograph month dataset's *_data_out.json artifacts were not materialized on disk (only the schema/builders remain), so the planned 4th absorption case could not be buil
The win (where present) traces to the SINGLE discovered absorber, not to multi-member grouping (M7).

REGIME SPLIT (mechanism, INDEPENDENT of the joint verdict): absorption sub-contexts give a CLEAN sparse KG edit (footprint ~0.01-0.03, firing-Jaccard ~0.002-0.04, high parent recall-hole); co-firing s

taxonomic_georgia: NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.014

taxonomic_jordan: NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.014,

taxonomic_us: NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET — even at FULL single-latent ablation the KG edit does not induce real forgetting (completion-drop CI incl 0 AND sub-probe drop < 0.1); KG token-footprint 0.017, NOO

taxonomic_us (CO-FIRING: firing-Jaccard 0.0402, parent recall-hole 0.197, KG token-footprint 0.017); fork=NO_MEANINGFUL_FORGET_SCOPE_TO_PARTIAL_SUPPRESSION. M5 ROUTER-FALSE-NEGATIVE: per-absorber firi
toxicity_insult (CO-FIRING: firing-Jaccard 0.8821, parent recall-hole 0.0, KG token-footprint 0.166); fork=KG_BEATS_GATED_DENSE_AT_MEANINGFUL_FORGET. NOT counted toward the absorption gate.
